description: Incorrectly identified the recording 04-14 Strategic Perspective on AI Growth and Business Adoption as being from the RBM Fort Worth event. It was from the YPO LS Gold Forum on 2026-04-14.
correction: The recording was from YPO LS Gold Forum (brian@delosshipping.com, thomaswheat76@gmail.com, huddy9370@gmail.com, beau.wehrle@gmail.com, geoffbrenner@me.com). The agent looked at the wrong calendar event — the RBM event also ran on 2026-04-14 which caused the false match.
systemic_fix: When matching a recording to a calendar event, check recording time against event time window more precisely. Do not assume the largest/most prominent event on a date is the correct one. Surface the matched event name when asking for speaker ID so the controller can correct it immediately.
